steps.t: Imrêkh-guthlu can be found in the southern reaches of Máttugard, near Deepscrave. You should travel to Imrêkh-guthlu.
Hetbrúda can be found at Imrêkh-guthlu in Máttugard. You should talk to Hetbrúda.
Lóssi can be found at Imrêkh-guthlu in Máttugard. You should talk to Lóssi.
Imrêkh-guthlu can be found in the southern reaches of Máttugard, near Deepscrave. You should defend Imrêkh-guthlu.
Hetbrúda can be found at Imrêkh-guthlu in Máttugard. You should talk to Hetbrúda.
